revealed_facts: Active Fuel Management lifters ticking on cold start with intermittent misfire codes on cylinders 1 and 7; lifter/cam replacement needed
8-speed automatic exhibits shudder between 35-50 mph indicating torque converter lockup clutch failure; repair typically $2,800-$3,500
Odometer was rolled back from 187,000 to 142,000 miles; prior auction records confirm actual mileage
